DEFT'S PC1473,7 MOTION VACATE CONVICTION OR SENTENCE, P & A FILED

/CAL: DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE THE PLEA OF GUILTY AND VACATE THE PRIOR JUDGMENT AND CONVICTION PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 11-01-94 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEATO A VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY  CODE SECTION 11360(A), ENTERED 10-03-94, IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THEPEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 3, A MISDEMEANORVIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV &PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:3/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATEDDISPOSITION/TWS/CH3:ISS:CPROB:PROB 1 D:PJ1D/CTS:1/VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD: COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/DISM3/NUNCDAT: 10-03-94/X: SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/
